assertions.title: SVG favicon exists and is referenced

steps.observed: File exists: packages/frontend/public/favicon.svg — SVG with swap-arrows icon (viewBox 0 0 64 64, two arrow paths with light/dark mode @media support)
Found exactly: <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" /> in packages/frontend/index.html

evidence.fileCheck: packages/frontend/public/favicon.svg exists; index.html contains <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />

steps.action: Verify favicon served by dev server
steps.observed: curl http://localhost:5173/favicon.svg -> 200 OK, SVG content returned

evidence.network: curl http://localhost:5173/favicon.svg -> 200 with SVG content; browser DOM confirms link[rel=icon].href = 'http://localhost:5173/favicon.svg'

assertions.title: Selecting From token swaps with To when duplicate

steps.action: Select USDC as To token (type 'USDC' in To input, click option)
steps.observed: To token = USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48), From token = empty

steps.action: Select WETH as From token (type 'WETH' in From input, click option)
steps.expected: From token = WETH, To token = USDC (no swap, they're different)
steps.observed: From = WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2), To = USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48). No swap triggered — correct.

steps.action: Select USDC as From token (same as current To=USDC)
steps.expected: Swap occurs: From becomes USDC, To becomes the old From value (WETH)
steps.observed: After selecting USDC as From: From = USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48), To = WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2). Spinbutton labels: 'YOU SELL USDC' and 'YOU RECEIVE WETH'. Swap occurred correctly.

evidence.inputValues: After swap: get value From = 'USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48)', get value To = 'WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2)'

assertions.title: Selecting To token swaps with From when duplicate

steps.action: Starting state: From=USDC, To=WETH (from previous assertion flow)
Select USDC as To token (same as current From=USDC)
steps.expected: Swap occurs: To becomes USDC, From becomes old To value (WETH)
steps.observed: After selecting USDC as To: From = WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2), To = USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48). Spinbutton labels: 'YOU SELL WETH' and 'YOU RECEIVE USDC'. Reverse swap occurred correctly.

evidence.inputValues: After reverse swap: get value From = 'WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2)', get value To = 'USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48)'

steps.action: Observe displayed text in both TokenInput components after each swap (VAL-SWAP-001 and VAL-SWAP-002)
steps.expected: Both inputs show the correct token symbol and address text after swaps
steps.observed: After VAL-SWAP-001 swap (From=WETH+To=USDC → From=USDC+To=WETH): From input displayed 'USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48)', To input displayed 'WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2)'. Spinbutton labels confirmed: 'YOU SELL USDC', 'YOU RECEIVE WETH'.

steps.action: Observe display after VAL-SWAP-002 reverse swap
steps.observed: After VAL-SWAP-002 swap: From input = 'WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2)', To input = 'USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48)'. Spinbutton labels: 'YOU SELL WETH', 'YOU RECEIVE USDC'. Display text updated correctly in both fields.

evidence.inputValues: agent-browser get value confirmed correct display text in both From and To inputs after each swap

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-FAV-001 confirmed via file system check (favicon.svg exists in public/, index.html has correct link tag). VAL-FAV-002 confirmed via browser DOM evaluation and curl verification that favicon is served. VAL-SWAP-001/002/003 confirmed via agent-browser interaction: selecting From=USDC when To=USDC triggers swap (From↔To exchange), selecting To=USDC when From=USDC triggers reverse swap, and display text in both TokenInput components updates correctly after each swap.
